message:
🐛 fix: restore STANDARD_CRON_FIELD_COUNT constant in NightlyReleasePulse (#8472)

PR #8463 re-introduced a magic number (parts.length === 5) that was
previously extracted in PR #8427. Restore the named constant to pass
the magic-numbers ratchet test.

Fixes #8466

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
